observations.title: Auth system architecture of LK UKMs PHP app
observations.content:
**What**: Complete authentication and authorization system mapped for the LK UKMs PHP application at /var/www/lk.pjdigital.top

**Why**: Need full understanding of auth flows for security review and development

**Where**: 
- `/includes/security.php` — CSRF, password hashing, rate limiting, CORS, `requireRole()`, `redirectUnlessPageRole()`
- `/includes/functions.php` — `isLoggedIn()`, `getCurrentUser()`, `requireLogin()`, `normalizeApprover()`, `recordLoginAudit()`
- `/api/auth.php` — Login/logout/session-check/CSRF-token API endpoints
- `/pages/login.php` — Server-rendered login form with identical logic
- `/config/database.php` — Session configuration (8-hour lifetime, httponly, SameSite=Lax)
- `/index.php` — Router with page-level role guards
- `/api/bootstrap.php` — Blocks direct .php access to API files
- `/api/users.php` — User CRUD with role validation, password change
- `/api/proposal.php` — Data-scoped access per role
- `/templates/sidebar.php` — Role-based menu visibility
- `/templates/header.php` — CSRF token injected into JS
- `/templates/footer.php` — Client-side logout handler

**Learned**:
- 6 roles: Super Admin, Admin, User, Approver, Disposisi, Read Only
- Session-based auth only (no OAuth, JWT, or token-based API auth)
- Dual login paths: API (`/api/auth` POST) and server-rendered (`/login` POST)
- Legacy plaintext password support with automatic bcrypt upgrade
- Rate limiting: 5 attempts per 15 min per IP+username
- CSRF tokens: session-stored, generated via `bin2hex(random_bytes(32))`
- `session_regenerate_id(true)` on login/logout to prevent session fixation
- Session cookie: httponly, SameSite=Lax, secure flag when HTTPS
- Data scoping in proposals: User sees own, Approver sees chain, Admin sees chain+own, Super Admin/Read Only see all
- Page routing in index.php has role guards that redirect restricted roles
- `requireRole()` returns 403 JSON; `redirectUnlessPageRole()` returns 302 redirect
- Login audit log tracks all auth events (success, failed, rejected, logout)

observations.title: LK UKMs - Complete API Endpoint Map (10 endpoints)
observations.content:
**What**: All 10 API endpoints with their actions, methods, roles, and parameters.

**Where**: `api/*.php` files, routed via `index.php`. All require `requireLogin()` except auth endpoints. All POST write actions require CSRF validation.

**Routing**: `index.php` maps URI prefixes (e.g., `/api/auth` -> `api/auth.php`). `api/bootstrap.php` blocks direct `.php` access in URLs.

**1. /api/auth** (auth.php) - No auth required:
- POST login: username, password + CSRF. Rate limited (5/15min). Login audit.
- POST logout: CSRF. Destroys session.
- POST checkSession: Returns current session status.
- POST getCsrfToken: Returns new CSRF token.

**2. /api/users** (users.php) - All logged in:
- GET getUsers: Super Admin, Admin. Lists all users.
- GET getUser: Super Admin, Admin. Single user by id.
- GET getActivityLogs: Super Admin, Admin. Last 100 logs.
- GET getDashboardStats: Any. Role-aware stats.
- GET getProposalBadgeCount: Any. Sidebar badge.
- GET getActiveUserTrend: Super Admin, Admin. Login trend.
- GET getSystemSettings: Super Admin. AI config.
- POST addUser: Super Admin. Create user + welcome email.
- POST updateUserProfile: Any. Own phone/email.
- POST changeOwnPassword: Any. Old+new password.
- POST deleteUser: Super Admin. Not ID 1.
- POST resetUserPassword: Super Admin, Admin. Random 12-char.
- POST updateUserByAdmin: Super Admin. Full update.
- POST saveSystemSettings: Super Admin. System+AI config.
- POST sendLoginInfoWA: Super Admin, Admin. WhatsApp credentials.

**3. /api/proposal** (proposal.php) - Largest (3470 lines):
- GET getProposals: Any (scoped). Pagination, filters, tabs.
- GET getProposal: Any (scoped). Single with revision history.
- GET getArchivePengaju: Super Admin. Archive browse.
- GET getArchiveByPengaju: Super Admin. Documents by pengaju.
- GET getApprovalChain: Any (scoped). Chain for pengaju.
- GET generateLembarPengesahan: SA/ketua-dpm/Owner. PDF for proposals.
- GET generateLembarPengesahanLPJ: SA/ketua-dpm/Owner. PDF for LPJ.
- GET getUndoPreview: Super Admin. Preview undo.
- POST addProposal: User. Submit proposal/LPJ.
- POST updateStatusProposal: Admin/SA/Approver. Approve/reject/revise.
- POST reviseProposal: Any. Upload revision.
- POST sendReminder: Super Admin. WhatsApp/email reminder.
- POST editProposalByAdmin: Admin/SA. Edit budget.
- POST updateProposalFinancialStatus: Super Admin. Financial status.
- POST markLpjSelesai: Admin/SA. Mark LPJ done.
- POST editProposalTanggalPelaksanaan: Super Admin. Edit date.
- POST deleteProposal: Super Admin. Delete with LPJ.
- POST undoLastApprovalAction: Super Admin. Undo with snapshot.
- POST analyzeProposal: Any (scoped). AI analysis.
- POST extractTextProposal: Any (scoped). PDF text extraction.
- POST continueAnalysisProposal: Any (scoped). Continue AI chat.

**4. /api/surat** (surat.php) - 2594 lines:
- GET getSuratMasuk: Any (scoped). Paginated with filters.
- GET getSuratMasukKategoriCounts: Super Admin.
- GET getSuratKeluar: Any (scoped). Paginated.
- GET getDisposisiBySurat: Any (scoped).
- GET getDisposisiList: Any (scoped). Inbox/sent with stats.
- GET getMonitoringSurat: Admin/SA. Monitoring view.
- GET generatePengesahanSurat: Super Admin. PDF with QR.
- POST addSuratMasuk: User. Create incoming letter.
- POST updateSuratDetail: Super Admin. Update details.
- POST addSuratKeluar: User. Send outgoing letter (creates paired surat_masuk for SA).
- POST addDisposisiSurat: Super Admin. Create disposition.
- POST updateDisposisiStatus: Any (scoped). Update disposition status.
- POST reviseSuratKeluar: User. Upload revision.
- POST updateStatusSurat: Admin/SA. Approve/reject with email.
- POST deleteSuratMasuk/Keluar: Super Admin.

**5. /api/alur** (alur.php) - Super Admin only:
- GET getAlur, getApproverUsers, getUKMUsers, getUKMWithoutAlur, getUnresolvedApprovers
- POST addAlur, updateAlur, deleteAlur

**6. /api/pengumuman** (pengumuman.php):
- GET getAnnouncements: Any.
- POST addAnnouncement: Admin/SA.
- POST deleteAnnouncement: Super Admin.

**7. /api/arsip** (arsip.php):
- GET getArsipData: Admin/SA.
- POST addArsipData: Admin/SA. File upload.
- POST deleteArsip: Super Admin.
- POST analyzeArsip, extractTextArsip, continueAnalysisArsip: AI analysis.

**8. /api/laporan** (laporan.php) - Admin/SA:
- GET getLaporanMeta, getLaporanData, downloadExcel (PhpSpreadsheet).

**9. /api/penggunaan_ruangan** (penggunaan_ruangan.php):
- GET getPenggunaanRuangan: SA/User.
- POST addPenggunaanRuangan, updatePenggunaanRuangan: Super Admin.

**10. /api/login_audit** (login_audit.php) - Admin/SA:
- GET paginated audit log with filters.

**Security Middleware Chain**: applyApiCorsHeaders -> applyApiSecurityHeaders -> handleApiPreflightRequest -> requireLogin -> requireRole -> requireCsrfToken (POST).

**File Upload**: All uploads use `extractUploadPayload()` (supports base64 or multipart), validated by `uploadFileSecure()` with MIME/extension/size checks.

**PDF Generation**: TCPDF streaming directly to browser. Proposal pengesahan (QR per approver), LPJ pengesahan, Surat pengesahan (QR).

**AI Integration**: External API (configurable). Caching via ai_prompt_hash. Document locking. Rate-limited continuations.

observations.title: LK UKMs - Authentication & Authorization System
observations.content:
**What**: Complete session-based auth system with 6 roles, CSRF, rate limiting, login audit, and bcrypt passwords.

**Where**: `includes/security.php` (CSRF, passwords, roles, CORS, rate limiting), `includes/functions.php` (isLoggedIn, requireLogin, getCurrentUser), `api/auth.php` (login/logout endpoints), `config/database.php` (session config).

**Roles (6)**:
1. Super Admin - Full access. Manages users, alur, system settings, financial status. Sees all data.
2. Admin - Scoped to approval chain + own submissions. Can manage users, monitoring, logs, laporan.
3. Approver - Sees only proposals in their chain. Can approve/reject/revise. No surat access.
4. User - UKM level. Submit proposals/LPJ, send surat keluar, manage rooms. Own data only.
5. Disposisi - Limited to: Dashboard, Surat Masuk, Disposisi, Profil. Redirected for other pages.
6. Read Only - View-only: Dashboard, Surat Masuk, Disposisi, Proposal, Profil.

**Login Flow**:
1. CSRF validation (requireCsrfToken)
2. Rate limiting check (5 attempts/15min, keyed by sha256(IP+username))
3. User lookup (case-insensitive)
4. Password verify (bcrypt, legacy plaintext auto-upgrade with force_change=1)
5. Session creation (session_regenerate_id, set $_SESSION['user'])
6. CSRF rotation (csrfRotateToken)
7. Login audit logging (recordLoginAudit)
8. Activity logging (recordLog)

**Session Config**: 8-hour lifetime, httponly, SameSite=Lax, secure when HTTPS, path=/.

**Password Security**: bcrypt via password_hash(). Legacy plaintext auto-upgraded on login. force_change flag for new/reset accounts. Min 6 chars for changes.

**CSRF**: 32-byte random hex in $_SESSION. Injected as window.csrfToken in header.php. Validated via hash_equals(). Rotated on login/logout.

**Rate Limiting**: File-based in /tmp/. Login: 5/15min per IP+user. WhatsApp: 50/15min per actor.

**Page Guards in index.php**:
- Disposisi: dashboard, surat_masuk, disposisi, profil, login only
- Read Only: dashboard, surat_masuk, disposisi, proposal, profil, login only
- Admin pages (monitoring, laporan, arsip, activity_logs, login_audit): SA+Admin
- SA pages (users, alur, system_settings, arsip_proposal): SA only
- penggunaan_ruangan: SA+User only

**Data Scoping** (proposal): User=own, Approver=chain, Admin=chain+own, SA=all, Read Only=all.

**Key Functions**: isLoggedIn(), getCurrentUser(), requireLogin(), requireRole($roles), redirectUnlessPageRole($roles, $redirectTo), normalizeApprover() (underscore/space normalization), verifyPassword(), hashPassword(), csrfGenerateToken(), csrfValidateToken(), csrfRotateToken().

observations.title: LK UKMs - Frontend/UI Architecture
observations.content:
**What**: Server-rendered PHP with Tailwind CDN, vanilla JS, PWA support, role-specific mobile layouts.

**Where**: templates/header.php (head+CDN), sidebar.php (nav), footer.php (JS), 3 mobile nav files. public/css/styles.css. public/js/proposal-page.js.

**Templating**: PHP include-based. Flow: index.php -> pages/{page}.php -> header.php -> sidebar.php -> [content] -> footer.php. Login page standalone (no header/sidebar/footer).

**Styling (3 layers)**:
1. Tailwind CDN with custom maroon theme (primary=#8B1538, primary-dark=#6B0F2A, primary-light=#A0204D)
2. Custom CSS (styles.css): CSS vars, sidebar transitions, status badges, loading spinner, mobile nav, PWA styles, safe area insets
3. Inline <style> per page for page-specific components

**Design System**: Maroon primary (#8B1538), Inter font (300-800), Font Awesome 6.4, rounded-xl/2xl/3xl, subtle shadows, gradient CTAs.

**JavaScript**: No framework, no bundler. Vanilla ES6+ with async/await Fetch API.
- Global: showToast(), showLoading/hideLoading(), apiCall(), formatDate/Currency(), getStatusClass(), handleLogout(), toggleSidebar(), loadProposalBadge()
- window.csrfToken injected in header.php
- All API calls use FormData with csrf_token appended
- proposal-page.js (4412 lines) is most complex JS file

**UI Components**:
- Modals: fixed inset-0 with bg-black/50, open/close via hidden class toggle
- Tables: Hand-built HTML, server-side pagination, client-side sort
- Cards: .dashboard-panel pattern (white bg, rounded, shadow, border)
- Tabs: .tab-chip/.filter-chip with active=bg-primary text-white
- Badges: Sidebar badges (red=pending, amber=overdue), mobile nav badges
- Empty states: Centered icon + message + optional action
- Toasts: Fixed bottom-right, success/error/info types, auto-dismiss 3s
- Loading: Full-screen overlay + per-section skeletons + button spinners

**Responsive**: 
- Mobile (<768px): Bottom tab nav replaces sidebar for Approver/User/SA roles. SA has "Lainnya" bottom sheet.
- Tablet (768-1023px): Sidebar hidden for some roles
- Desktop (>=1024px): Full sidebar
- Touch targets: 48px minimum on coarse pointers
- Safe area insets throughout

**PWA**: Service worker (sw.js, cache-first for static, network-first for navigation), manifest.json (standalone, portrait, #8B1538), offline.html, install prompt with 7-day dismiss, full icon set (16-512px + maskable + apple-touch).

**Charts**: Chart.js CDN. Used in monitoring (doughnut), dashboard (line trend), users (bar trend with range toggle).

**Forms**: CSRF via window.csrfToken in FormData. HTML5 required/pattern. Server-side validation. PDF-only uploads for proposals/surat (10MB max).

observations.title: LK UKMs - Complete Database Schema (14 tables)
observations.content:
**What**: Complete database schema for lkukm_db with 14 active tables, all using soft foreign keys (no DB-level FK constraints).

**Where**: Canonical schema at `config/schema.sql`. Connection in `config/database.php` (host=localhost, db=lkukm_db, user=lkukm_user, charset=utf8mb4).

**Tables**:

1. **users** - User accounts. Columns: id, username (unique), password (bcrypt), name, jabatan, sebutan, role, phone, email, nim, unit, force_change, created_date. Roles: Super Admin, Admin, User, Approver, Disposisi, Read Only.

2. **activity_logs** - Audit trail. Columns: id, waktu, username, nama_lengkap, role, aktivitas (JSON in newer entries). Indexes: idx_waktu, idx_username.

3. **login_audit_logs** - Auth audit. Columns: id, created_at, attempted_username, user_id, user_role, status (enum: success/failed/rejected/logout), reason_code, reason_label, ip_address, user_agent, session_hash, request_id.

4. **surat_masuk** - Incoming letters. Columns: id, nomor_surat, tanggal_terima, pengirim, no_hp, perkara, kategori, extra_data (JSON), status, keterangan, url_dokumen, owner (FK users.username), ref_id, nim.

5. **surat_keluar** - Outgoing letters. Columns: id, nomor_surat, tanggal_kirim, tujuan, perkara, kategori, extra_data (JSON), status, history (JSON), url_dokumen, created_by (FK users.username), ref_id, manual_name, manual_phone, idempotency_key (unique).

6. **surat_disposisi** - Dispositions. Columns: id, surat_masuk_id (FK), ref_id, nomor_surat, perihal, dari_username, dari_nama, kepada_username, kepada_nama, kepada_role, isi_disposisi, prioritas (Rendah/Sedang/Tinggi), tenggat, status, created_at, updated_at.

7. **arsip** - Document archive with AI. Columns: id, tanggal, nama_surat, perkara, url_file, uploaded_by, keterangan, content_text, ai_analysis, ai_analysis_at, ai_prompt_hash, ai_usage (JSON).

8. **penggunaan_ruangan** - Room bookings. Columns: id, tanggal, jam_mulai, jam_selesai, ruangan, pengguna_ruangan, created_by, created_at.

9. **pengumuman** - Announcements. Columns: id, tanggal, isi, created_by.

10. **proposal** - Proposals AND LPJ (distinguished by jenis field). Columns: id, tanggal_upload, nama_kegiatan, jenis (Proposal/LPJ), pengaju, status, status_keuangan (Menunggu/Proses Keuangan/Dicairkan), keterangan, url_file, content_text, ai_analysis, ai_analysis_at, ai_prompt_hash, ai_usage, ketua, nim_ketua, nama_bank, no_rekening, jumlah_anggaran (decimal 15,2), tanggal_pelaksanaan, current_approver, parent_proposal_id (self-FK for LPJ), history (JSON).

11. **proposal_revision_history** - Revision tracking. Columns: id, proposal_id, revision_cycle, version_no, event_type (REQUEST/UPLOAD), approver_username, approver_name, request_note, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, file_url.

12. **alur** - Approval chains. Columns: id, pengaju (unique), acc1-acc6 (approver usernames).

13. **proposal_reminder_log** - Reminder tracking. Columns: id, proposal_id, milestone, recipient_type, recipient_key, sent_at. Unique constraint on (proposal_id, milestone, recipient_type, recipient_key).

14. **system_config** - Key-value config. Columns: id, config_key (unique), config_value. Keys: OPEN_SURAT, SYSTEM_NAME, SYSTEM_DESC, AI_BASE_URL, AI_API_KEY, AI_MODEL, PROPOSAL_PENDING_THRESHOLD_DAYS.

**Design Patterns**: Soft FK only (app-level), denormalized names alongside usernames, JSON in TEXT columns (history fields), lazy schema migration via ALTER TABLE at runtime, idempotency keys on surat_keluar.

observations.title: LK UKMs - Project Architecture Overview
observations.content:
**What**: LK UKMs is a native PHP application (no framework) for managing proposals, LPJ, surat, disposisi, pengumuman, users, and approval workflows for student organizations (UKM) at UNISBANK Semarang. Converted from Google Apps Script.

**Why**: Core system for UKM administrative workflows at Universitas Stikubank.

**Where**: Deployed at `/var/www/lk.pjdigital.top/`

**Architecture**:
- Entry point: `index.php` (router) with `.htaccess` rewrite rules
- API layer: `api/*.php` (10 files) - JSON endpoints for AJAX calls
- Page layer: `pages/*.php` (17 files) - server-rendered HTML views
- Templates: `templates/header.php`, `sidebar.php`, `footer.php` + 3 mobile nav files
- Includes: `includes/functions.php` (2615 lines), `security.php` (370 lines), `email.php` (320 lines), `env.php`
- Config: `config/database.php` (DB connection + session), `config/schema.sql` (authoritative schema)
- Public: `public/css/styles.css`, `public/js/proposal-page.js` (4412 lines), `public/icons/`
- Scripts: `scripts/` - migrations, checks, seed scripts
- Docs: `CLAUDE.md`, `panduanagen.md`, `arsitektur.md`, `analisis.md`, `AGENTS.md`
- Wiki: `.ai-team/wiki/` (12 files), `.ai-team/rules/` (4 files)
- AI agents: `.pi/agents/` (5 agent definitions), `.ai-team/` (6-role team)

**Request Flow**:
Browser -> Apache (.htaccess) -> index.php (router) -> api/*.php OR pages/*.php -> templates (header/sidebar/footer) -> includes (functions/security) -> config/database.php -> MySQL

**Tech Stack**:
- Backend: Native PHP 8.x, MySQL/MariaDB, mysqli with prepared statements
- Frontend: Tailwind CDN (maroon theme #8B1538), Font Awesome 6.4, Chart.js, vanilla JS
- Dependencies: TCPDF (PDF), endroid/qr-code (QR), PHPMailer (email), PhpSpreadsheet (Excel)
- PWA: Service worker, manifest, offline page, mobile bottom navs per role
- Timezone: Asia/Jakarta

**Largest Files**: api/proposal.php (3470 lines), includes/functions.php (2615 lines), api/surat.php (2594 lines), pages/surat_masuk.php (2528 lines), public/js/proposal-page.js (4412 lines)

observations.title: LK UKMs - Business Modules & Workflows
observations.content:
**What**: All business modules with their workflows, status transitions, and business rules.

**Where**: api/proposal.php, api/surat.php, api/users.php, api/alur.php, api/pengumuman.php, api/arsip.php, api/penggunaan_ruangan.php, api/laporan.php. Corresponding pages in pages/*.php.

**1. PROPOSAL & LPJ MODULE** (core module):
- Shared `proposal` table, distinguished by `jenis` field (Proposal/LPJ)
- Proposal Status: Menunggu {acc1} -> Menunggu {acc2} -> ... -> Disetujui (or Ditolak/Revisi at any step)
- Revision: Revisi -> User uploads -> Menunggu {same approver}
- Financial Status: Menunggu -> Proses Keuangan -> Dicairkan (SA only)
- LPJ Lifecycle: Parent proposal must be Disetujui + Dicairkan -> LPJ created -> Same approval chain -> Approved -> Marked Selesai
- Wajib LPJ: Proposal with status_keuangan=Dicairkan and no linked LPJ
- Undo: SA can undo last approval via _snapshot in history JSON. Blocked if financial status changed.
- Approval chain: Up to 6 approvers per pengaju (acc1-acc6 in alur table)
- normalizeApprover() for underscore/space matching
- Auto-reminders: H-3, H-5, H-7 milestones
- Role scoping: User=own, Approver=chain, Admin=chain+own, SA=all

**2. SURAT (LETTER) MODULE**:
- Surat Masuk: SA creates -> Menunggu -> Disetujui/Revisi/Ditolak (SA only)
- Surat Keluar: User sends to SA -> Creates paired surat_masuk for SA -> SA reviews -> Status syncs bidirectionally
- Kategori system with dynamic extra_data (JSON)
- DOCX-to-PDF conversion via ZipArchive+TCPDF
- Idempotency key on surat_keluar

**3. DISPOSISI (DISPOSITION) MODULE**:
- SA creates dispositions from surat_masuk to any user
- Statuses: Terkirim -> Dibaca -> Diproses -> Selesai
- Priority: Rendah/Sedang/Tinggi with optional deadline (tenggat)
- Inbox/Sent box model
- Email+WhatsApp notifications on creation

**4. USER MANAGEMENT**:
- CRUD by SA. Admin can reset passwords.
- Default password: 123456 (force_change on first login)
- Welcome email on creation if email provided
- Login info via WhatsApp (sendLoginInfoWA)
- User ID 1 (first SA) cannot be deleted

**5. APPROVAL CHAIN (ALUR) MODULE**:
- SA configures acc1-acc6 per pengaju
- Health checks: getUKMWithoutAlur(), getUnresolvedApprovers()

**6. PENGUMUMAN**: Simple CRUD. Admin/SA create, SA delete, all view.

**7. ARSIP (ARCHIVE)**: Document archive with AI analysis. SA/Admin add/delete. Text extraction + AI analysis with caching.

**8. PENGGUNAAN RUANGAN**: Room booking. SA/User view, SA add/update.

**9. LAPORAN (REPORTS)**: 4 report types: Rekapitulasi Proposal, LPJ, Surat, Keuangan. Excel export via PhpSpreadsheet. Admin/SA only.

**10. AI ANALYSIS**: External API (configurable). Applied to proposals and arsip. Features: text extraction from PDF/DOCX, caching via ai_prompt_hash, document locking, rate-limited continuations, DB append for chat history.

**11. NOTIFICATIONS**: WhatsApp via wa.dwibudi.my.id API. Email via PHPMailer/Gmail SMTP. Events: submit, approve, reject, revise, remind, disposisi, financial change, undo.

**12. PDF GENERATION**: TCPDF with QR codes. Proposal pengesahan (QR per approver), LPJ pengesahan, Surat pengesahan.

**13. AUDIT LOGGING**: activity_logs (general), login_audit_logs (auth). Functions: recordLog(), recordLogSystem(), recordEventLog(), recordLoginAudit(). Request ID correlation.

observations.title: LK UKMs - Documentation & Wiki Structure
observations.content:

**Where**: Root .md files, .ai-team/wiki/ (12 files), .ai-team/rules/ (4 files), docs/ (9 files), .pi/agents/ (5 files), .ai-team/output/ (30+ files).

- `arsitektur.md` - Architecture with Mermaid diagrams, routing map, role matrix, proposal lifecycle, security findings.

- 04-database-schema.md, 05-api-map.md, 06-page-map.md
- 07-proposal-lpj-workflow.md, 08-surat-workflow.md

**Rules** (.ai-team/rules/): agent-routing.md, qa-rules.md, security-rules.md, development-rules.md

**Pi Agents** (.pi/agents/): lk-analyst, lk-developer, lk-qa, lk-designer, lk-docs (all gpt-5.5, thinking: medium)

observations.title: Auth system architecture of LK UKMs PHP app
observations.content:
**What**: Complete authentication and authorization system mapped for the LK UKMs PHP application at /var/www/lk.pjdigital.top

**Why**: Need full understanding of auth flows for security review and development

**Where**: 
- `/includes/security.php` — CSRF, password hashing, rate limiting, CORS, `requireRole()`, `redirectUnlessPageRole()`
- `/includes/functions.php` — `isLoggedIn()`, `getCurrentUser()`, `requireLogin()`, `normalizeApprover()`, `recordLoginAudit()`
- `/api/auth.php` — Login/logout/session-check/CSRF-token API endpoints
- `/pages/login.php` — Server-rendered login form with identical logic
- `/config/database.php` — Session configuration (8-hour lifetime, httponly, SameSite=Lax)
- `/index.php` — Router with page-level role guards
- `/api/bootstrap.php` — Blocks direct .php access to API files
- `/api/users.php` — User CRUD with role validation, password change
- `/api/proposal.php` — Data-scoped access per role
- `/templates/sidebar.php` — Role-based menu visibility
- `/templates/header.php` — CSRF token injected into JS
- `/templates/footer.php` — Client-side logout handler

**Learned**:
- 6 roles: Super Admin, Admin, User, Approver, Disposisi, Read Only
- Session-based auth only (no OAuth, JWT, or token-based API auth)
- Dual login paths: API (`/api/auth` POST) and server-rendered (`/login` POST)
- Legacy plaintext password support with automatic bcrypt upgrade
- Rate limiting: 5 attempts per 15 min per IP+username
- CSRF tokens: session-stored, generated via `bin2hex(random_bytes(32))`
- `session_regenerate_id(true)` on login/logout to prevent session fixation
- Session cookie: httponly, SameSite=Lax, secure flag when HTTPS
- Data scoping in proposals: User sees own, Approver sees chain, Admin sees chain+own, Super Admin/Read Only see all
- Page routing in index.php has role guards that redirect restricted roles
- `requireRole()` returns 403 JSON; `redirectUnlessPageRole()` returns 302 redirect
- Login audit log tracks all auth events (success, failed, rejected, logout)

observations.title: LK UKMs - Complete API Endpoint Map (10 endpoints)
observations.content:
**What**: All 10 API endpoints with their actions, methods, roles, and parameters.

**Where**: `api/*.php` files, routed via `index.php`. All require `requireLogin()` except auth endpoints. All POST write actions require CSRF validation.

**Routing**: `index.php` maps URI prefixes (e.g., `/api/auth` -> `api/auth.php`). `api/bootstrap.php` blocks direct `.php` access in URLs.

**1. /api/auth** (auth.php) - No auth required:
- POST login: username, password + CSRF. Rate limited (5/15min). Login audit.
- POST logout: CSRF. Destroys session.
- POST checkSession: Returns current session status.
- POST getCsrfToken: Returns new CSRF token.

**2. /api/users** (users.php) - All logged in:
- GET getUsers: Super Admin, Admin. Lists all users.
- GET getUser: Super Admin, Admin. Single user by id.
- GET getActivityLogs: Super Admin, Admin. Last 100 logs.
- GET getDashboardStats: Any. Role-aware stats.
- GET getProposalBadgeCount: Any. Sidebar badge.
- GET getActiveUserTrend: Super Admin, Admin. Login trend.
- GET getSystemSettings: Super Admin. AI config.
- POST addUser: Super Admin. Create user + welcome email.
- POST updateUserProfile: Any. Own phone/email.
- POST changeOwnPassword: Any. Old+new password.
- POST deleteUser: Super Admin. Not ID 1.
- POST resetUserPassword: Super Admin, Admin. Random 12-char.
- POST updateUserByAdmin: Super Admin. Full update.
- POST saveSystemSettings: Super Admin. System+AI config.
- POST sendLoginInfoWA: Super Admin, Admin. WhatsApp credentials.

**3. /api/proposal** (proposal.php) - Largest (3470 lines):
- GET getProposals: Any (scoped). Pagination, filters, tabs.
- GET getProposal: Any (scoped). Single with revision history.
- GET getArchivePengaju: Super Admin. Archive browse.
- GET getArchiveByPengaju: Super Admin. Documents by pengaju.
- GET getApprovalChain: Any (scoped). Chain for pengaju.
- GET generateLembarPengesahan: SA/ketua-dpm/Owner. PDF for proposals.
- GET generateLembarPengesahanLPJ: SA/ketua-dpm/Owner. PDF for LPJ.
- GET getUndoPreview: Super Admin. Preview undo.
- POST addProposal: User. Submit proposal/LPJ.
- POST updateStatusProposal: Admin/SA/Approver. Approve/reject/revise.
- POST reviseProposal: Any. Upload revision.
- POST sendReminder: Super Admin. WhatsApp/email reminder.
- POST editProposalByAdmin: Admin/SA. Edit budget.
- POST updateProposalFinancialStatus: Super Admin. Financial status.
- POST markLpjSelesai: Admin/SA. Mark LPJ done.
- POST editProposalTanggalPelaksanaan: Super Admin. Edit date.
- POST deleteProposal: Super Admin. Delete with LPJ.
- POST undoLastApprovalAction: Super Admin. Undo with snapshot.
- POST analyzeProposal: Any (scoped). AI analysis.
- POST extractTextProposal: Any (scoped). PDF text extraction.
- POST continueAnalysisProposal: Any (scoped). Continue AI chat.

**4. /api/surat** (surat.php) - 2594 lines:
- GET getSuratMasuk: Any (scoped). Paginated with filters.
- GET getSuratMasukKategoriCounts: Super Admin.
- GET getSuratKeluar: Any (scoped). Paginated.
- GET getDisposisiBySurat: Any (scoped).
- GET getDisposisiList: Any (scoped). Inbox/sent with stats.
- GET getMonitoringSurat: Admin/SA. Monitoring view.
- GET generatePengesahanSurat: Super Admin. PDF with QR.
- POST addSuratMasuk: User. Create incoming letter.
- POST updateSuratDetail: Super Admin. Update details.
- POST addSuratKeluar: User. Send outgoing letter (creates paired surat_masuk for SA).
- POST addDisposisiSurat: Super Admin. Create disposition.
- POST updateDisposisiStatus: Any (scoped). Update disposition status.
- POST reviseSuratKeluar: User. Upload revision.
- POST updateStatusSurat: Admin/SA. Approve/reject with email.
- POST deleteSuratMasuk/Keluar: Super Admin.

**5. /api/alur** (alur.php) - Super Admin only:
- GET getAlur, getApproverUsers, getUKMUsers, getUKMWithoutAlur, getUnresolvedApprovers
- POST addAlur, updateAlur, deleteAlur

**6. /api/pengumuman** (pengumuman.php):
- GET getAnnouncements: Any.
- POST addAnnouncement: Admin/SA.
- POST deleteAnnouncement: Super Admin.

**7. /api/arsip** (arsip.php):
- GET getArsipData: Admin/SA.
- POST addArsipData: Admin/SA. File upload.
- POST deleteArsip: Super Admin.
- POST analyzeArsip, extractTextArsip, continueAnalysisArsip: AI analysis.

**8. /api/laporan** (laporan.php) - Admin/SA:
- GET getLaporanMeta, getLaporanData, downloadExcel (PhpSpreadsheet).

**9. /api/penggunaan_ruangan** (penggunaan_ruangan.php):
- GET getPenggunaanRuangan: SA/User.
- POST addPenggunaanRuangan, updatePenggunaanRuangan: Super Admin.

**10. /api/login_audit** (login_audit.php) - Admin/SA:
- GET paginated audit log with filters.

**Security Middleware Chain**: applyApiCorsHeaders -> applyApiSecurityHeaders -> handleApiPreflightRequest -> requireLogin -> requireRole -> requireCsrfToken (POST).

**File Upload**: All uploads use `extractUploadPayload()` (supports base64 or multipart), validated by `uploadFileSecure()` with MIME/extension/size checks.

**PDF Generation**: TCPDF streaming directly to browser. Proposal pengesahan (QR per approver), LPJ pengesahan, Surat pengesahan (QR).

**AI Integration**: External API (configurable). Caching via ai_prompt_hash. Document locking. Rate-limited continuations.

observations.title: LK UKMs - Authentication & Authorization System
observations.content:
**What**: Complete session-based auth system with 6 roles, CSRF, rate limiting, login audit, and bcrypt passwords.

**Where**: `includes/security.php` (CSRF, passwords, roles, CORS, rate limiting), `includes/functions.php` (isLoggedIn, requireLogin, getCurrentUser), `api/auth.php` (login/logout endpoints), `config/database.php` (session config).

**Roles (6)**:
1. Super Admin - Full access. Manages users, alur, system settings, financial status. Sees all data.
2. Admin - Scoped to approval chain + own submissions. Can manage users, monitoring, logs, laporan.
3. Approver - Sees only proposals in their chain. Can approve/reject/revise. No surat access.
4. User - UKM level. Submit proposals/LPJ, send surat keluar, manage rooms. Own data only.
5. Disposisi - Limited to: Dashboard, Surat Masuk, Disposisi, Profil. Redirected for other pages.
6. Read Only - View-only: Dashboard, Surat Masuk, Disposisi, Proposal, Profil.

**Login Flow**:
1. CSRF validation (requireCsrfToken)
2. Rate limiting check (5 attempts/15min, keyed by sha256(IP+username))
3. User lookup (case-insensitive)
4. Password verify (bcrypt, legacy plaintext auto-upgrade with force_change=1)
5. Session creation (session_regenerate_id, set $_SESSION['user'])
6. CSRF rotation (csrfRotateToken)
7. Login audit logging (recordLoginAudit)
8. Activity logging (recordLog)

**Session Config**: 8-hour lifetime, httponly, SameSite=Lax, secure when HTTPS, path=/.

**Password Security**: bcrypt via password_hash(). Legacy plaintext auto-upgraded on login. force_change flag for new/reset accounts. Min 6 chars for changes.

**CSRF**: 32-byte random hex in $_SESSION. Injected as window.csrfToken in header.php. Validated via hash_equals(). Rotated on login/logout.

**Rate Limiting**: File-based in /tmp/. Login: 5/15min per IP+user. WhatsApp: 50/15min per actor.

**Page Guards in index.php**:
- Disposisi: dashboard, surat_masuk, disposisi, profil, login only
- Read Only: dashboard, surat_masuk, disposisi, proposal, profil, login only
- Admin pages (monitoring, laporan, arsip, activity_logs, login_audit): SA+Admin
- SA pages (users, alur, system_settings, arsip_proposal): SA only
- penggunaan_ruangan: SA+User only

**Data Scoping** (proposal): User=own, Approver=chain, Admin=chain+own, SA=all, Read Only=all.

**Key Functions**: isLoggedIn(), getCurrentUser(), requireLogin(), requireRole($roles), redirectUnlessPageRole($roles, $redirectTo), normalizeApprover() (underscore/space normalization), verifyPassword(), hashPassword(), csrfGenerateToken(), csrfValidateToken(), csrfRotateToken().

observations.title: LK UKMs - Frontend/UI Architecture
observations.content:
**What**: Server-rendered PHP with Tailwind CDN, vanilla JS, PWA support, role-specific mobile layouts.

**Where**: templates/header.php (head+CDN), sidebar.php (nav), footer.php (JS), 3 mobile nav files. public/css/styles.css. public/js/proposal-page.js.

**Templating**: PHP include-based. Flow: index.php -> pages/{page}.php -> header.php -> sidebar.php -> [content] -> footer.php. Login page standalone (no header/sidebar/footer).

**Styling (3 layers)**:
1. Tailwind CDN with custom maroon theme (primary=#8B1538, primary-dark=#6B0F2A, primary-light=#A0204D)
2. Custom CSS (styles.css): CSS vars, sidebar transitions, status badges, loading spinner, mobile nav, PWA styles, safe area insets
3. Inline <style> per page for page-specific components

**Design System**: Maroon primary (#8B1538), Inter font (300-800), Font Awesome 6.4, rounded-xl/2xl/3xl, subtle shadows, gradient CTAs.

**JavaScript**: No framework, no bundler. Vanilla ES6+ with async/await Fetch API.
- Global: showToast(), showLoading/hideLoading(), apiCall(), formatDate/Currency(), getStatusClass(), handleLogout(), toggleSidebar(), loadProposalBadge()
- window.csrfToken injected in header.php
- All API calls use FormData with csrf_token appended
- proposal-page.js (4412 lines) is most complex JS file

**UI Components**:
- Modals: fixed inset-0 with bg-black/50, open/close via hidden class toggle
- Tables: Hand-built HTML, server-side pagination, client-side sort
- Cards: .dashboard-panel pattern (white bg, rounded, shadow, border)
- Tabs: .tab-chip/.filter-chip with active=bg-primary text-white
- Badges: Sidebar badges (red=pending, amber=overdue), mobile nav badges
- Empty states: Centered icon + message + optional action
- Toasts: Fixed bottom-right, success/error/info types, auto-dismiss 3s
- Loading: Full-screen overlay + per-section skeletons + button spinners

**Responsive**: 
- Mobile (<768px): Bottom tab nav replaces sidebar for Approver/User/SA roles. SA has "Lainnya" bottom sheet.
- Tablet (768-1023px): Sidebar hidden for some roles
- Desktop (>=1024px): Full sidebar
- Touch targets: 48px minimum on coarse pointers
- Safe area insets throughout

**PWA**: Service worker (sw.js, cache-first for static, network-first for navigation), manifest.json (standalone, portrait, #8B1538), offline.html, install prompt with 7-day dismiss, full icon set (16-512px + maskable + apple-touch).

**Charts**: Chart.js CDN. Used in monitoring (doughnut), dashboard (line trend), users (bar trend with range toggle).

**Forms**: CSRF via window.csrfToken in FormData. HTML5 required/pattern. Server-side validation. PDF-only uploads for proposals/surat (10MB max).

observations.title: LK UKMs - Complete Database Schema (14 tables)
observations.content:
**What**: Complete database schema for lkukm_db with 14 active tables, all using soft foreign keys (no DB-level FK constraints).

**Where**: Canonical schema at `config/schema.sql`. Connection in `config/database.php` (host=localhost, db=lkukm_db, user=lkukm_user, charset=utf8mb4).

**Tables**:

1. **users** - User accounts. Columns: id, username (unique), password (bcrypt), name, jabatan, sebutan, role, phone, email, nim, unit, force_change, created_date. Roles: Super Admin, Admin, User, Approver, Disposisi, Read Only.

2. **activity_logs** - Audit trail. Columns: id, waktu, username, nama_lengkap, role, aktivitas (JSON in newer entries). Indexes: idx_waktu, idx_username.

3. **login_audit_logs** - Auth audit. Columns: id, created_at, attempted_username, user_id, user_role, status (enum: success/failed/rejected/logout), reason_code, reason_label, ip_address, user_agent, session_hash, request_id.

4. **surat_masuk** - Incoming letters. Columns: id, nomor_surat, tanggal_terima, pengirim, no_hp, perkara, kategori, extra_data (JSON), status, keterangan, url_dokumen, owner (FK users.username), ref_id, nim.

5. **surat_keluar** - Outgoing letters. Columns: id, nomor_surat, tanggal_kirim, tujuan, perkara, kategori, extra_data (JSON), status, history (JSON), url_dokumen, created_by (FK users.username), ref_id, manual_name, manual_phone, idempotency_key (unique).

6. **surat_disposisi** - Dispositions. Columns: id, surat_masuk_id (FK), ref_id, nomor_surat, perihal, dari_username, dari_nama, kepada_username, kepada_nama, kepada_role, isi_disposisi, prioritas (Rendah/Sedang/Tinggi), tenggat, status, created_at, updated_at.

7. **arsip** - Document archive with AI. Columns: id, tanggal, nama_surat, perkara, url_file, uploaded_by, keterangan, content_text, ai_analysis, ai_analysis_at, ai_prompt_hash, ai_usage (JSON).

8. **penggunaan_ruangan** - Room bookings. Columns: id, tanggal, jam_mulai, jam_selesai, ruangan, pengguna_ruangan, created_by, created_at.

9. **pengumuman** - Announcements. Columns: id, tanggal, isi, created_by.

10. **proposal** - Proposals AND LPJ (distinguished by jenis field). Columns: id, tanggal_upload, nama_kegiatan, jenis (Proposal/LPJ), pengaju, status, status_keuangan (Menunggu/Proses Keuangan/Dicairkan), keterangan, url_file, content_text, ai_analysis, ai_analysis_at, ai_prompt_hash, ai_usage, ketua, nim_ketua, nama_bank, no_rekening, jumlah_anggaran (decimal 15,2), tanggal_pelaksanaan, current_approver, parent_proposal_id (self-FK for LPJ), history (JSON).

11. **proposal_revision_history** - Revision tracking. Columns: id, proposal_id, revision_cycle, version_no, event_type (REQUEST/UPLOAD), approver_username, approver_name, request_note, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, file_url.

12. **alur** - Approval chains. Columns: id, pengaju (unique), acc1-acc6 (approver usernames).

13. **proposal_reminder_log** - Reminder tracking. Columns: id, proposal_id, milestone, recipient_type, recipient_key, sent_at. Unique constraint on (proposal_id, milestone, recipient_type, recipient_key).

14. **system_config** - Key-value config. Columns: id, config_key (unique), config_value. Keys: OPEN_SURAT, SYSTEM_NAME, SYSTEM_DESC, AI_BASE_URL, AI_API_KEY, AI_MODEL, PROPOSAL_PENDING_THRESHOLD_DAYS.

**Design Patterns**: Soft FK only (app-level), denormalized names alongside usernames, JSON in TEXT columns (history fields), lazy schema migration via ALTER TABLE at runtime, idempotency keys on surat_keluar.

observations.title: LK UKMs - Project Architecture Overview
observations.content:
**What**: LK UKMs is a native PHP application (no framework) for managing proposals, LPJ, surat, disposisi, pengumuman, users, and approval workflows for student organizations (UKM) at UNISBANK Semarang. Converted from Google Apps Script.

**Why**: Core system for UKM administrative workflows at Universitas Stikubank.

**Where**: Deployed at `/var/www/lk.pjdigital.top/`

**Architecture**:
- Entry point: `index.php` (router) with `.htaccess` rewrite rules
- API layer: `api/*.php` (10 files) - JSON endpoints for AJAX calls
- Page layer: `pages/*.php` (17 files) - server-rendered HTML views
- Templates: `templates/header.php`, `sidebar.php`, `footer.php` + 3 mobile nav files
- Includes: `includes/functions.php` (2615 lines), `security.php` (370 lines), `email.php` (320 lines), `env.php`
- Config: `config/database.php` (DB connection + session), `config/schema.sql` (authoritative schema)
- Public: `public/css/styles.css`, `public/js/proposal-page.js` (4412 lines), `public/icons/`
- Scripts: `scripts/` - migrations, checks, seed scripts
- Docs: `CLAUDE.md`, `panduanagen.md`, `arsitektur.md`, `analisis.md`, `AGENTS.md`
- Wiki: `.ai-team/wiki/` (12 files), `.ai-team/rules/` (4 files)
- AI agents: `.pi/agents/` (5 agent definitions), `.ai-team/` (6-role team)

**Request Flow**:
Browser -> Apache (.htaccess) -> index.php (router) -> api/*.php OR pages/*.php -> templates (header/sidebar/footer) -> includes (functions/security) -> config/database.php -> MySQL

**Tech Stack**:
- Backend: Native PHP 8.x, MySQL/MariaDB, mysqli with prepared statements
- Frontend: Tailwind CDN (maroon theme #8B1538), Font Awesome 6.4, Chart.js, vanilla JS
- Dependencies: TCPDF (PDF), endroid/qr-code (QR), PHPMailer (email), PhpSpreadsheet (Excel)
- PWA: Service worker, manifest, offline page, mobile bottom navs per role
- Timezone: Asia/Jakarta

**Largest Files**: api/proposal.php (3470 lines), includes/functions.php (2615 lines), api/surat.php (2594 lines), pages/surat_masuk.php (2528 lines), public/js/proposal-page.js (4412 lines)

observations.title: LK UKMs - Business Modules & Workflows
observations.content:
**What**: All business modules with their workflows, status transitions, and business rules.

**Where**: api/proposal.php, api/surat.php, api/users.php, api/alur.php, api/pengumuman.php, api/arsip.php, api/penggunaan_ruangan.php, api/laporan.php. Corresponding pages in pages/*.php.

**1. PROPOSAL & LPJ MODULE** (core module):
- Shared `proposal` table, distinguished by `jenis` field (Proposal/LPJ)
- Proposal Status: Menunggu {acc1} -> Menunggu {acc2} -> ... -> Disetujui (or Ditolak/Revisi at any step)
- Revision: Revisi -> User uploads -> Menunggu {same approver}
- Financial Status: Menunggu -> Proses Keuangan -> Dicairkan (SA only)
- LPJ Lifecycle: Parent proposal must be Disetujui + Dicairkan -> LPJ created -> Same approval chain -> Approved -> Marked Selesai
- Wajib LPJ: Proposal with status_keuangan=Dicairkan and no linked LPJ
- Undo: SA can undo last approval via _snapshot in history JSON. Blocked if financial status changed.
- Approval chain: Up to 6 approvers per pengaju (acc1-acc6 in alur table)
- normalizeApprover() for underscore/space matching
- Auto-reminders: H-3, H-5, H-7 milestones
- Role scoping: User=own, Approver=chain, Admin=chain+own, SA=all

**2. SURAT (LETTER) MODULE**:
- Surat Masuk: SA creates -> Menunggu -> Disetujui/Revisi/Ditolak (SA only)
- Surat Keluar: User sends to SA -> Creates paired surat_masuk for SA -> SA reviews -> Status syncs bidirectionally
- Kategori system with dynamic extra_data (JSON)
- DOCX-to-PDF conversion via ZipArchive+TCPDF
- Idempotency key on surat_keluar

**3. DISPOSISI (DISPOSITION) MODULE**:
- SA creates dispositions from surat_masuk to any user
- Statuses: Terkirim -> Dibaca -> Diproses -> Selesai
- Priority: Rendah/Sedang/Tinggi with optional deadline (tenggat)
- Inbox/Sent box model
- Email+WhatsApp notifications on creation

**4. USER MANAGEMENT**:
- CRUD by SA. Admin can reset passwords.
- Default password: 123456 (force_change on first login)
- Welcome email on creation if email provided
- Login info via WhatsApp (sendLoginInfoWA)
- User ID 1 (first SA) cannot be deleted

**5. APPROVAL CHAIN (ALUR) MODULE**:
- SA configures acc1-acc6 per pengaju
- Health checks: getUKMWithoutAlur(), getUnresolvedApprovers()

**6. PENGUMUMAN**: Simple CRUD. Admin/SA create, SA delete, all view.

**7. ARSIP (ARCHIVE)**: Document archive with AI analysis. SA/Admin add/delete. Text extraction + AI analysis with caching.

**8. PENGGUNAAN RUANGAN**: Room booking. SA/User view, SA add/update.

**9. LAPORAN (REPORTS)**: 4 report types: Rekapitulasi Proposal, LPJ, Surat, Keuangan. Excel export via PhpSpreadsheet. Admin/SA only.

**10. AI ANALYSIS**: External API (configurable). Applied to proposals and arsip. Features: text extraction from PDF/DOCX, caching via ai_prompt_hash, document locking, rate-limited continuations, DB append for chat history.

**11. NOTIFICATIONS**: WhatsApp via wa.dwibudi.my.id API. Email via PHPMailer/Gmail SMTP. Events: submit, approve, reject, revise, remind, disposisi, financial change, undo.

**12. PDF GENERATION**: TCPDF with QR codes. Proposal pengesahan (QR per approver), LPJ pengesahan, Surat pengesahan.

**13. AUDIT LOGGING**: activity_logs (general), login_audit_logs (auth). Functions: recordLog(), recordLogSystem(), recordEventLog(), recordLoginAudit(). Request ID correlation.

observations.title: Knowledge Hub Pipeline - dbs-second-brain setup
observations.content:
**What**: Pipeline Pi → Engram → GitHub knowledge hub uses canonical repo `dbs-second-brain`.

**Why**: Consolidate coding-agent knowledge, docs, wiki, memories, agents, and rules into one GitHub repo for cross-server access and version control.

**Where**: GitHub repo `https://github.com/iggbudi/dbs-second-brain`; local clone `~/dbs-second-brain`; sync script `~/dbs-second-brain/scripts/sync-knowledge.sh`; Engram config `/var/www/lk.pjdigital.top/.engram/config.json`.

Flow: Pi saves observations to Engram; `engram sync --all` exports chunks; `engram export` updates JSON; repo commit/push makes knowledge available to other servers; other servers pull and run `engram sync --import`.

observations.title: Pipeline Engram - Cara kerja Knowledge Hub
observations.content:
**What**: Penjelasan lengkap tentang pipeline Engram untuk Knowledge Hub "Otak Kedua DBS"

**Why**: Agar Pi di server manapun tahu cara kerja sistem knowledge dan bagaimana mereka terhubung

---

## PIPELINE ENGRAM - KNOWLEDGE HUB

### Apa itu Engram?

Engram adalah **persistent memory system** untuk Pi (AI Coding Agent). Engram memungkinkan Pi untuk:
- Menyimpan knowledge lintas session
- Mengakses knowledge dari session sebelumnya
- Berbagi knowledge dengan Pi di server lain

### Arsitektur Pipeline

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        SERVER A (pjdigital.top)                  │
│                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────┐    ┌─────────┐    ┌─────────┐    ┌─────────┐    │
│  │  Pi     │───▶│ Engram  │───▶│ Chunks  │───▶│ GitHub  │    │
│  │ Session │    │ (SQLite)│    │ (.gz)   │    │ Push    │    │
│  └─────────┘    └─────────┘    └─────────┘    └────┬────┘    │
│                                                     │         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼─────────┘
                                                      │
                                                      ▼
                                        ┌─────────────────────┐
                                        │  dbs-second-brain   │
                                        │  (Otak Kedua DBS)   │
                                        │  GitHub Repo        │
                                        └──────────┬──────────┘
                                                   │
                      ┌────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────┐
                      │                            │                            │
                      ▼                            ▼                            ▼
        ┌─────────────────────┐      ┌─────────────────────┐      ┌─────────────────────┐
        │     SERVER B        │      │     SERVER C        │      │     SERVER D        │
        │                     │      │                     │      │                     │
        │  ┌─────┐ ┌───────┐ │      │  ┌─────┐ ┌───────┐ │      │  ┌─────┐ ┌───────┐ │
        │  │ Git │▶│ Engram│ │      │  │ Git │▶│ Engram│ │      │  │ Git │▶│ Engram│ │
        │  │Pull │ │Import │ │      │  │Pull │ │Import │ │      │  │Pull │ │Import │ │
        │  └─────┘ └───────┘ │      │  └─────┘ └───────┘ │      │  └─────┘ └───────┘ │
        │                     │      │                     │      │                     │
        │  Pi bisa akses      │      │  Pi bisa akses      │      │  Pi bisa akses      │
        │  semua knowledge!   │      │  semua knowledge!   │      │  semua knowledge!   │
        └─────────────────────┘      └─────────────────────┘      └─────────────────────┘
```

---

## KOMPONEN-KOMPONEN

### 1. Engram (Persistent Memory)

**Lokasi**: `/var/www/your-project/.engram/`

**Struktur**:
```
.engram/
├── config.json      ← Konfigurasi project
├── manifest.json    ← Index semua chunks
└── chunks/          ← Knowledge chunks
    ├── chunk1.jsonl.gz
    ├── chunk2.jsonl.gz
    └── ...
```

**Tipe Knowledge yang Disimpan**:
| Type | Contoh |
|------|--------|
| `discovery` | "Project X pakai PHP + MySQL" |
| `preference` | "User suka dokumentasi terstruktur" |
| `decision` | "Breakpoint CSS diubah dari 1023px ke 767px" |
| `bugfix` | "Cache version diupdate karena CSS lama di-cache" |
| `config` | "Instruksi setup knowledge hub" |
| `architecture` | "Konsep central knowledge hub" |

### 2. Pi Extension (Auto-Sync)

**Lokasi**: `~/.pi/extensions/knowledge-sync.ts`

**Fungsi**: Otomatis sync knowledge ke GitHub saat Pi session berakhir

**Trigger**:
- Session berakhir (Ctrl+C, /quit, /new, /resume, /fork)
- Manual: `/sync-knowledge` command

**Yang Dilakukan**:
1. `engram sync --all` → Export semua knowledge ke chunks
2. Copy chunks ke `~/dbs-second-brain/memories/`
3. `git add .` → Stage perubahan
4. `git commit -m "auto-sync: Pi session {reason} ({timestamp})"`
5. `git push` → Push ke GitHub

### 3. Cron Job (Backup Sync)

**Jadwal**: Setiap 6 jam (`0 */6 * * *`)

**Script**: `~/dbs-second-brain/scripts/sync-knowledge.sh`

**Fungsi**: Backup jika extension tidak jalan atau session crash

### 4. GitHub (Central Hub)

**Repo**: https://github.com/iggbudi/dbs-second-brain

**Struktur**:
```
dbs-second-brain/
├── README.md           ← Panduan setup untuk Pi baru
├── memories/
│   └── .engram/
│       └── chunks/     ← Semua knowledge chunks
├── docs/               ← Dokumentasi project
├── wiki/               ← Knowledge wiki
├── agents/             ← Custom agent definitions
├── rules/              ← Development rules
└── scripts/            ← Sync & utility scripts
```

---

## ALUR KERJA LENGKAP

### Saat Pi Session Berakhir

```
1. User ketik /quit atau Ctrl+C
         │
         ▼
2. Extension detect session_shutdown
         │
         ▼
3. Extension jalankan: engram sync --all
         │
         ▼
4. Knowledge di-export ke chunks (.jsonl.gz)
         │
         ▼
5. Chunks di-copy ke ~/dbs-second-brain/memories/
         │
         ▼
6. git add .
         │
         ▼
7. git commit -m "auto-sync: Pi session quit (2026-06-25T15:30:00Z)"
         │
         ▼
8. git push origin main
         │
         ▼
9. Notification: "Knowledge synced to GitHub (5 files changed)"
```

### Saat Pi di Server Lain Ingin Akses Knowledge

```
1. Pi baru di server lain
         │
         ▼
2. Clone repo: git clone https://github.com/iggbudi/dbs-second-brain.git
         │
         ▼
3. Copy chunks ke project: cp -r dbs-second-brain/memories/.engram/chunks/* /var/www/project/.engram/chunks/
         │
         ▼
4. Import ke Engram: engram sync --import
         │
         ▼
5. Search knowledge: engram search "inventory project"
         │
         ▼
6. Pi tahu tentang 8 project di server A!
```

---

## CONTOH PENGGUNAAN

### Simpan Knowledge Baru

```python
# Pi akan otomatis memanggil:
mem_save(
    title="Project baru ditemukan",
    content="Di server B ada project X yang pakai Laravel + MySQL",
    type="discovery"
)
```

### Akses Knowledge yang Ada

```python
# Pi search knowledge:
mem_search("project mana yang pakai PHP?")
# → Hasil: 4 project di server A, 1 di server B

mem_search("preferensi user")
# → Hasil: Suka dokumentasi terstruktur, desain style claw
```

### Update Knowledge yang Ada

```python
# Pi update knowledge:
mem_update(
    id=23,
    content="Inventory project: 9 project di 2 server (tambah 1 project baru)"
)
```

---

## KNOWLEDGE YANG TERSEDIA

Setelah setup, Pi bisa akses:

### Inventory Project (8 di Server A)

| Domain | Nama | Stack |
|--------|------|-------|
| lk.pjdigital.top | LK UKMs | PHP + MySQL |
| bot.pjdigital.top | Slack Bot | Node.js + SQLite |
| wa.dwibudi.my.id | WhatsApp Gateway | Node.js + MariaDB |
| dwibudi.my.id | Ruang Belajar LMS | PHP + MySQL |
| dpmp2.dwibudi.my.id | SIMPMU | PHP + MySQL |
| lelangu.my.id | Crypto Chart | HTML/JS |
| nanariset.my.id | Nana Research + X Creator | PHP + Next.js |
| eclipsetrack.my.id | Panduan Jurnal | PHP + Supabase |

### Preferensi User (DBS)

| Preferensi | Detail |
|------------|--------|
| **Nama** | DBS (panggil dengan nama ini!) |
| **Dokumentasi** | Suka terstruktur (README, CHANGELOG, arsitektur.md) |
| **Desain** | Style claw (maroon, gradient, rounded) |
| **Bahasa** | Indonesia untuk user-facing docs |
| **Coding** | PHP native, Tailwind CSS, prepared statements |

### Decision History

| Keputusan | Alasan |
|-----------|--------|
| Breakpoint 1023px → 767px | Menu mobile muncul di PC |
| Cache v13 → v14 | CSS lama di-cache |
| Buat dokumentasi terstruktur | Suka pola bot.pjdigital.top |
| Rename repo ke dbs-second-brain | Personalisasi |

---

## TROUBLESHOOTING

### Engram tidak ditemukan
```bash
npm install -g @earendil-works/engram
```

### Knowledge tidak muncul setelah import
```bash
ls -la /var/www/project/.engram/chunks/
engram search "test"
```

### Push conflict
```bash
cd ~/dbs-second-brain
git pull --rebase
git push
```

### Extension tidak jalan
```bash
ls -la ~/.pi/extensions/
~/dbs-second-brain/scripts/sync-knowledge.sh
```

---

## CHECKLIST SETUP

- [ ] Engram terinstall
- [ ] Repo cloned
- [ ] Engram config dibuat
- [ ] Knowledge di-import
- [ ] Pi extension di-setup
- [ ] Cron job di-setup (opsional)
- [ ] Test search knowledge
- [ ] Pi bisa mulai bekerja

---

## LINK PENTING

| Resource | URL |
|----------|-----|
| **GitHub Repo** | https://github.com/iggbudi/dbs-second-brain |
| **Server A** | pjdigital.top (8 project) |
| **User** | DBS |

---

*Instruksi ini tersimpan di Engram dan akan auto-sync ke GitHub "Otak Kedua DBS"*
*Pi di server lain bisa akses dengan: `engram search "pipeline engram"`*

observations.title: Pi harus cek Engram di awal sesi
observations.content:
**What**: Setiap sesi baru Pi dimulai, WAJIB panggil `mem_context` atau `mem_search` dulu sebelum merespon user

**Why**: DBS kecewa karena Pi lupa informasi yang sudah disimpan di Engram. Engram bekerja, tapi Pi tidak proaktif mencari memory.

**Where**: Semua sesi Pi, di semua server

**Learned**:
1. Jangan assume "baru mulai" berarti "tidak tahu apa-apa"
2. Selalu cek Engram dulu di awal sesi
3. DBS punya memory tersimpan: identitas, preferensi, pipeline knowledge hub
4. Repo Otak Kedua: https://github.com/iggbudi/dbs-second-brain

**Rules**:
- Awal sesi → `mem_context(project=current)` dulu
- Kalau user tanya sesuatu yang pernah dibahas → `mem_search` dulu
- Jangan bilang "tidak tahu" sebelum cek memory

observations.title: Bandingkan Engram dan GitHub Otak Kedua
observations.content:
**What**: Engram lokal dan repo GitHub dbs-second-brain dibandingkan untuk melihat kelengkapan knowledge.
**Why**: DBS menegaskan bahwa memori Engram dan GitHub harus saling melengkapi, bukan saling menggantikan.
**Where**: Engram project lk-ukms/simapro dan GitHub repo https://github.com/iggbudi/dbs-second-brain (`README.md`, `memories/engram-export.json`, `memories/server-aidis-inventory.md`, `wiki/server-aidis-my-id-full-inventory.md`).
**Learned**: Engram live berisi 31 observations/22 sessions lintas project lk-ukms dan simapro; GitHub export berisi 31 observations/21 sessions dari snapshot 2026-06-25 15:37:51 plus curated docs/wiki Server B. Server B inventory ada di GitHub tetapi belum searchable di Engram lokal current project. README masih punya beberapa referensi lama `lk-ukms-knowledge` meski repo benar adalah `dbs-second-brain`.

observations.title: Import Server B aidis.my.id inventory
observations.content:
**What**: Server B (`aidis.my.id`) inventory from GitHub Otak Kedua DBS imported into Engram.
**Why**: DBS asked that Engram memory and GitHub knowledge base must complement each other; Server B existed in GitHub README/wiki but was not searchable in local Engram.
**Where**: Source repo `https://github.com/iggbudi/dbs-second-brain`, files `README.md`, `memories/server-aidis-inventory.md`, `wiki/server-aidis-my-id-full-inventory.md`.
**Learned**: Server B has 17 active projects: 1) `aidis.my.id` Disposisi Surat UNISBANK, PHP native + PostgreSQL; 2) `al-barokah.my.id` Masjid Al-Barokah, PHP native + DOMPDF; 3) `botjb.nanariset.my.id` static placeholder; 4) `bot.shm.my.id` SIMPEL-U Telegram Bot, Node.js/TypeScript/Telegraf/Pi SDK/MySQL; 5) `brainboard.socai.my.id` Laravel; 6) `cmaestro.my.id` BengkelBot AI chatbot, Node.js/TypeScript/Pi SDK/SQLite; 7) `eduguide.socai.my.id` AI Academic Assistant, Next.js + Laravel + Supabase; 8) `fetal.pjdigital.top` active SSL, details unknown; 9) `inv.nanariset.my.id` invoice system, Node.js; 10) `kl.socai.my.id` Kausar Leather, PHP native + MySQL; 11) `quizify.socai.my.id` Laravel quiz app; 12) `safesphere.my.id` anti-bullying reporting system, Node.js/Express/SQLite; 13) `simpelu.my.id` SIMPEL-U campus management, PHP native + MySQL; 14) `sjmlelang.com` online auction platform, PHP native + MySQL; 15) `socai.my.id` main platform + Telegram bot, Node.js/Express/PostgreSQL; 16) `studdybuddy.socai.my.id` AI Study Buddy, Laravel + MongoDB + Groq; 17) `vibeplan.socai.my.id` AI planning assistant, Laravel + Next.js + MongoDB. Stack grouping in README: PHP Native 5, Laravel 5, Node.js/Express/utility 5, Static/Other 2. Full detail should remain curated in GitHub wiki; Engram should hold searchable summary and pointers.

observations.title: Import aidis.my.id project knowledge
observations.content:
**What**: Key knowledge for `aidis.my.id` Disposisi Surat UNISBANK imported from GitHub into Engram.
**Why**: GitHub contained detailed project knowledge that local Engram did not surface; DBS wants Engram and GitHub to complement each other.
**Where**: Source `dbs-second-brain/memories/aidis-my-id-knowledge.md` and `wiki/aidis-my-id-disposisi-surat.md`.
**Learned**: `aidis.my.id` is a native PHP 8.2+ PostgreSQL 15+ web app for university incoming-letter disposition. Architecture is 3-layer Controller → Service → Repository; frontend is vanilla HTML/CSS/JS; tests use PHPUnit 10 with SQLite in-memory. Critical constraints: no Laravel/Symfony/frameworks, no React/Vue/Angular, no external deps without approval except PHPMailer, always prepared statements, escape HTML with `htmlspecialchars()`, validate CSRF, and enforce object-level authorization in services. RBAC has 11 roles: Rektor, Sekretaris_Rektor, Wakil_Rektor, Admin_Wakil_Rektor, Admin_Fakultas, Direktur, Dekan, Kepala_Divisi, Kaprodi, Staf, Admin_Tata_Usaha. Service response format: `['success'=>bool,'message'=>string,'data'=>array optional,'errors'=>array optional]`. Known resolved issues include notification URL normalization, login security with CSRF/rate limiting/session cookies, and enum mismatch from missing migration 002. Pending security/quality focus: object-level authorization, file upload access control, notification read authorization, TanggapanService wiring in DisposisiController, UUID generator should use `random_bytes()`. Important files: `public/index.php`, `config/app.php`, `config/database.php`, `docs/README.md`, `docs/TODO.md`. Common commands: `composer install`, `./vendor/bin/phpunit`, `php -S localhost:8080 -t public public/router.php`, database setup via `psql -U postgres -d disposisi_surat -f database/full_dump.sql`.
